instructions: Refactor and improve the kit to match specs and improve reusability across use cases. Preserve reconstructive shared surfaces, Storybook/example parity, dark mode, accessibility-sensitive states, and reusable code/editor/diff components.
Inspect the live source only. Do not work from stale summaries.
Read and trace the shared paths that define reusable kit behavior: `src/components/**`, `src/mockups/**`, relevant Storybook stories, shared CSS, and the example app.
Map where page-specific implementation is still blocking reuse.
Be explicit about gaps in: componentization, configurable section/page surfaces, Storybook controls, code/diff/editor adoption, dark-mode support, and a11y-sensitive states.
prompt.task: Trace the real runtime surfaces that define the compendium kit, stories, and example-app usage, then identify the highest-value reuse and spec-fit gaps.

title: Trace shared kit surfaces and reuse gaps

inputs.requestText: Refactor and improve the kit to match specs and improve reusability across use cases. Preserve reconstructive shared surfaces, Storybook/example parity, dark mode, accessibility-sensitive states, and reusable code/editor/diff components.
